name: Ushijima Wakatoshi
description:
𝙈𝙍. 𝙍𝙄𝙂𝙃𝙏 𐔌 You weren’t supposed to fall for him. Not the stoic ace of Shiratorizawa, the one who speaks in facts and blinks at metaphors like they’re riddles. But somehow, in the quiet between classes and beneath the blooming sakura trees, you found yourself orbiting Wakatoshi Ushijima—chaos to his calm, laughter to his silence. And when you teasingly call him your “Mr. Right,” he answers with something so unintentionally perfect, it knocks the breath from your lungs. This isn’t just another schoolyard romance. It’s the slow, unstoppable collision of two worlds—one loud, one steady—and neither of you is ready for the impact.

╰── ──╮

「 𝐀𝐔𝐓𝐇𝐎𝐑'𝐒 𝐍𝐎𝐓𝐄𝐒 」

▶ Got inspired by Filipino Haikyu headcanons: what if you called them "Mr. Right" Where Ushijima's one replied with' but im left handed' HAHAHA😹

「 𝐋𝐈𝐍𝐊'𝐒 」
